verse.name: v1
verse.lines: All my hands have made I'm laying down All that I hold dear, my many crowns I have tasted and seen of Your great love You satisfy me, You satisfy me

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Spirit fall, open up Heaven's door We're waiting with worship for more You're the only love that satisfies me Oh Lord, satisfy me

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: My constant request above all things Every hour I wake, be near me Though I've tasted and seen of Your great love Show me Your glory, show me Your glory Show me Your glory, show me Your glory

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Spirit fall, open up Heaven's door We're waiting with worship for more You're the only love that satisfies me Lord we run, into Your loving arms We're safe and secure in Your love You're the only love that satisfies me

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Leave me astounded, leave me amazed Show off Your glory, let Heaven invade We're waiting with worship, we're waiting with praise For the almighty presence of God to invade
